strategy: She only has 2,805 health - kill her before round 4, when she steals all helpful charms and wards from every wizard.
Do not trap her: any Trap makes her buff her whole team (blade, accuracy, spear, healing). Do not Feint her either - she cleanses it.
Hit with Myth, Life, or Death - she takes 15% more from those and resists Fire/Ice/Storm 30%.
Blade up fast (blades are only stolen at round 4) and burst her down in the first three rounds before the steal.
Do not join late - a latecomer eats a 500-damage Star Mana Burn that pierces all resist.
cheatNotes: A wizard who joins late eats a Star Mana Burn that pierces all resist for 500 damage. Enter on time.
Round 1 she summons a Clockworker, and with more than two wizards she keeps summoning until her side is full.
Every 4th round she steals all helpful charms AND wards from every wizard. Kill her or hit before round 4.
Feinting her makes her Cleanse Ward off all her harmful wards. Skip Feint.
Casting any Trap on her buffs her entire team with the charms below. Do not trap her.
Part of the trap punish: a +30% universal Blade on her allies.
Part of the trap punish: a +20% Accuracy Charm.
Part of the trap punish: a +10% universal Spear.
Part of the trap punish: a +30% Healing Charm.
